## 🚀 Feature Request

### 📝 Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

### 🎯 Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?
- [ ] Improves user experience
- [ ] Increases efficiency
- [ ] Reduces manual work
- [ ] Enhances security
- [ ] Adds business value
- [ ] Other: ___________

### 💡 Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of the feature:

**What should happen:**


**How it should work:**


### 🌟 Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1. **Use Case 1:**
   - As a [user role]
   - I want to [action]
   - So that [benefit]

2. **Use Case 2:**
   - As a [user role]
   - I want to [action]
   - So that [benefit]

### 🎨 Proposed Solution
Describe your preferred solution approach:

**Frontend:**
- [ ] New page/component
- [ ] Modify existing UI
- [ ] Add form fields
- [ ] Update navigation
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Backend:**
- [ ] New API endpoints
- [ ] Database changes
- [ ] Business logic updates
- [ ] Authentication changes
- [ ] Other: ___________

### 🔧 Technical Considerations

**Database Changes:**
- [ ] New tables
- [ ] New columns
- [ ] Index changes
- [ ] Migration required
- [ ] No DB changes

**API Changes:**
- [ ] New endpoints
- [ ] Modify existing endpoints
- [ ] New permissions
- [ ] Breaking changes
- [ ] Backward compatible

**Dependencies:**
- [ ] New packages required
- [ ] Infrastructure changes
- [ ] External services
- [ ] No new dependencies

### 📱 Affected Modules
Which parts of the system would be affected?
- [ ] Authentication/RBAC
- [ ] Drivers Management
- [ ] Vehicles Management
- [ ] Routes Management
- [ ] Trips Management
- [ ] Settlement System
- [ ] Reporting/Analytics
- [ ] Import/Export
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Other: ___________

### 🎛️ Alternative Solutions
Describe alternative approaches you've considered:

### 📊 Acceptance Criteria
Define clear criteria for when this feature is complete:

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3
- [ ] Tests implemented
- [ ] Documentation updated

### 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples:

### 🔗 Related Issues
Link any related issues or dependencies:

### 📈 Priority
How important is this feature?
- [ ] Critical (Blocking other work)
- [ ] High (Important for next release)
- [ ] Medium (Nice to have soon)
- [ ] Low (Future consideration)

### 🕒 Timeline
When would you like to see this implemented?
- [ ] Next sprint
- [ ] Next release
- [ ] Within 3 months
- [ ] No rush
- [ ] Other: ___________
